entry.title: IDC TIRNO17D00004 (6) awarded to ACCENTURE FEDERAL SERVICES LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IEP 1.5 MANAGED SERVICESTHIS CONTRACT PROVIDES O&M SERVICES FOR IRS.GOV. AND IS NEEDED DURING A SHUT-DOWN TO SERVE THE PUBLIC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- INTEGRATED HARDWARE/SOFTWARE/SERVICES SOLUTIONS, PREDOMINANTLY SERVICES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.
